alias-pkg.rationale: Aliases must remain deterministic and grep-friendly.
alias-pkg.false_positive_policy: Allow manual override only for generated code paths.

no-side-effects.rationale: Import-time purity is required for predictable compile/runtime.

sensitive-imports.rationale: Sensitive imports require explicit policy ownership.

export-naming.rationale: Stable naming conventions reduce API churn and migration cost.
export-naming.false_positive_policy: Temporary exception only during deprecation window.

diag-namespace.false_positive_policy: None; must be fixed at source.
